basic_details.job_title: KRCL Mechanical Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 19 Safety Officer, Project Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Safety Officer, Project Manager / Mechanical, Project Engineer / Mechanical and Junior Technical Assistant / Mechanical
basic_details.short_information: Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL) has released the official Safety Officer, Project Manager / Mechanical, Project Engineer / Mechanical and Junior Technical Assistant / Mechanical Notification 2026 on 07 May 2026 at the official website. A total of 19 vacancies have been announced under the KRCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 45–55 years (depending on the post) and holding a Full-time Degree in Mechanical/Production & Industrial/Automobile/Manufacturing/Mechatronics/Material Science/Metallurgical Engineering or Diploma in Industrial Safety with Degree/Di

age_limit.details: Project Manager / Mechanical: 45 years as on 01.05.2026 Project Engineer / Mechanical: 50 years as on 01.05.2026 Junior Technical Assistant / Mechanical: 45 years as on 01.05.2026 Safety Officer: 55 years as on 01.05.2026 Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC-NCL, 5 years for SC (if applying in reserved category). Ex-servicemen: discretionary relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: Full-time Degree in Mechanical / Production & Industrial / Automobile / Manufacturing / Mechatronics / Material Science / Metallurgical Engineering, Diploma in Industrial Safety + Degree/Diploma in Engineering OR Degree/Diploma in Science (Physics/Chemistry)
qualification.details: Project Manager / Mechanical: Full-time Degree in Mechanical / Production & Industrial / Automobile / Manufacturing / Mechatronics / Material Science / Metallurgical Engineering from AICTE recognized institute. Minimum 6 years post-qualification experience preferably in Manufacturing or Repair Workshops. Project Engineer / Mechanical: Full-time Degree in Mechanical / Production & Industrial / Automobile / Manufacturing / Mechatronics / Material Science / Metallurgical Engineering from AICTE recognized institute. Minimum 4 years post-qualification experience preferably in Manufacturing or Repair Workshops. Junior Technical Assistant / Mechanical: Full-time Degree in Mechanical / Production & Industrial / Automobile / Manufacturing / Mechatronics / Material Science / Metallurgical Engineering from AICTE recognized institute. Minimum 2 years post-qualification experience preferably in Repair Workshops or Manufacturing Units. Safety Officer: Diploma in Industrial Safety + Degree/Diploma in Engineering OR Degree/Diploma in Science (Physics/Chemistry) from AICTE recognized institute. Minimum 1 year experience (desirable).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for KRCL Mechanical Posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled from May 21, 2026, to May 26, 2026, depending on the specific post. Candidates should check the exact date for their desired post.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application fee for KRCL Mechanical Posts?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Project Engineer / Mechanical?
faq.answer: A full-time Degree in Mechanical or related engineering fields from an AICTE recognized institute is required, along with a minimum of 4 years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for Junior Technical Assistant / Mechanical?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly salary for Junior Technical Assistant / Mechanical ranges from Rs. 41,380 to Rs. 47,220.

faq.question: Q5. Where is the walk-in interview venue for KRCL Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Konkan Railway Corporation Limited, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, 400614. Specific reporting details should be confirmed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any age relaxations available for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is available: 3 years for OBC-NCL and 5 years for SC candidates applying in their reserved category. Ex-servicemen may also receive discretionary relaxation.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any online application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview, and there is no prior online application process.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies announced by KRCL?
faq.answer: Konkan Railway Corporation Limited has announced a total of 19 vacancies for various Mechanical posts.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Mechanical posts?
faq.answer: The job type for these Mechanical posts is Contractual.
